members.name: _ConfirmCodeCompletion
members.summary: Override this method to define how the selected entry should be inserted. If [param replace] is [code]true[/code], any existing text should be replaced.

members.name: _FilterCodeCompletionCandidates
members.summary: Override this method to define what items in [param candidates] should be displayed. Both [param candidates] and the return is an [Array] of [Dictionary], see [method get_code_completion_option] for [Dictionary] content.

members.name: _RequestCodeCompletion
members.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user requests code completion. If [param force] is [code]true[/code], any checks should be bypassed.

members.name: AddAutoBraceCompletionPair
members.signature: public void AddAutoBraceCompletionPair(String startKey, String endKey)
members.summary: Adds a brace pair. Both the start and end keys must be symbols. Only the start key has to be unique.

members.name: AddCodeCompletionOption
members.signature: public void AddCodeCompletionOption(int type, String displayText, String insertText, Color textColor, Resource icon, Variant value, int location)
members.summary: Submits an item to the queue of potential candidates for the autocomplete menu. Call [method update_code_completion_options] to update the list. [param location] indicates location of the option relative to the location of the code completion query. See [enum CodeEdit.CodeCompletionLocation] for how to set this value. [b]Note:[/b] This list will replace all current candidates.

members.name: AddCommentDelimiter
members.signature: public void AddCommentDelimiter(String startKey, String endKey, bool lineOnly)
members.summary: Adds a comment delimiter from [param start_key] to [param end_key]. Both keys should be symbols, and [param start_key] must not be shared with other delimiters. If [param line_only] is [code]true[/code] or [param end_key] is an empty [String], the region does not carry over to the next line.

members.name: AddStringDelimiter
members.signature: public void AddStringDelimiter(String startKey, String endKey, bool lineOnly)
members.summary: Defines a string delimiter from [param start_key] to [param end_key]. Both keys should be symbols, and [param start_key] must not be shared with other delimiters. If [param line_only] is [code]true[/code] or [param end_key] is an empty [String], the region does not carry over to the next line.

members.name: CanFoldLine
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is foldable. A line is foldable if it is the start of a valid code region (see [method get_code_region_start_tag]), if it is the start of a comment or string block, or if the next non-empty line is more indented (see [method TextEdit.get_indent_level]).

members.name: CancelCodeCompletion
members.summary: Cancels the autocomplete menu.

members.name: ClearBookmarkedLines
members.summary: Clears all bookmarked lines.

members.name: ClearBreakpointedLines
members.summary: Clears all breakpointed lines.

members.name: ClearCommentDelimiters
members.summary: Removes all comment delimiters.

members.name: ClearExecutingLines
members.summary: Clears all executed lines.

members.name: ClearStringDelimiters
members.summary: Removes all string delimiters.

members.name: ConfirmCodeCompletion
members.summary: Inserts the selected entry into the text. If [param replace] is [code]true[/code], any existing text is replaced rather than merged.

members.name: ConvertIndent
members.signature: public void ConvertIndent(int fromLine, int toLine)
members.summary: Converts the indents of lines between [param from_line] and [param to_line] to tabs or spaces as set by [member indent_use_spaces]. Values of [code]-1[/code] convert the entire text.

members.name: CreateCodeRegion
members.summary: Creates a new code region with the selection. At least one single line comment delimiter have to be defined (see [method add_comment_delimiter]). A code region is a part of code that is highlighted when folded and can help organize your script. Code region start and end tags can be customized (see [method set_code_region_tags]). Code regions are delimited using start and end tags (respectively [code]region[/code] and [code]endregion[/code] by default) preceded by one line comment delimiter. (eg. [code]#region[/code] and [code]#endregion[/code])

members.name: DeleteLines
members.summary: Deletes all lines that are selected or have a caret on them.

members.name: DoIndent
members.summary: If there is no selection, indentation is inserted at the caret. Otherwise, the selected lines are indented like [method indent_lines]. Equivalent to the [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_indent] action. The indentation characters used depend on [member indent_use_spaces] and [member indent_size].

members.name: DuplicateLines
members.summary: Duplicates all lines currently selected with any caret. Duplicates the entire line beneath the current one no matter where the caret is within the line.

members.name: DuplicateSelection
members.summary: Duplicates all selected text and duplicates all lines with a caret on them.

members.name: FoldAllLines
members.summary: Folds all lines that are possible to be folded (see [method can_fold_line]).

members.name: FoldLine
members.summary: Folds the given line, if possible (see [method can_fold_line]).

members.name: GetAutoBraceCompletionCloseKey
members.summary: Gets the matching auto brace close key for [param open_key].

members.name: GetBookmarkedLines
members.summary: Gets all bookmarked lines.

members.name: GetBreakpointedLines
members.summary: Gets all breakpointed lines.

members.name: GetCodeCompletionOption
members.summary: Gets the completion option at [param index]. The return [Dictionary] has the following key-values: [code]kind[/code]: [enum CodeCompletionKind] [code]display_text[/code]: Text that is shown on the autocomplete menu. [code]insert_text[/code]: Text that is to be inserted when this item is selected. [code]font_color[/code]: Color of the text on the autocomplete menu. [code]icon[/code]: Icon to draw on the autocomplete menu. [code]default_value[/code]: Value of the symbol.

members.name: GetCodeCompletionOptions
members.summary: Gets all completion options, see [method get_code_completion_option] for return content.

members.name: GetCodeCompletionSelectedIndex
members.summary: Gets the index of the current selected completion option.

members.name: GetCodeRegionEndTag
members.summary: Returns the code region end tag (without comment delimiter).

members.name: GetCodeRegionStartTag
members.summary: Returns the code region start tag (without comment delimiter).

members.name: GetDelimiterEndKey
members.summary: Gets the end key for a string or comment region index.

members.name: GetDelimiterEndPosition
members.signature: public Vector2 GetDelimiterEndPosition(int line, int column)
members.summary: If [param line] [param column] is in a string or comment, returns the end position of the region. If not or no end could be found, both [Vector2] values will be [code]-1[/code].

members.name: GetDelimiterStartKey
members.summary: Gets the start key for a string or comment region index.

members.name: GetDelimiterStartPosition
members.signature: public Vector2 GetDelimiterStartPosition(int line, int column)
members.summary: If [param line] [param column] is in a string or comment, returns the start position of the region. If not or no start could be found, both [Vector2] values will be [code]-1[/code].

members.name: GetExecutingLines
members.summary: Gets all executing lines.

members.name: GetFoldedLines
members.summary: Returns all lines that are currently folded.

members.name: GetTextForCodeCompletion
members.summary: Returns the full text with char [code]0xFFFF[/code] at the caret location.

members.name: GetTextForSymbolLookup
members.summary: Returns the full text with char [code]0xFFFF[/code] at the cursor location.

members.name: GetTextWithCursorChar
members.signature: public String GetTextWithCursorChar(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the full text with char [code]0xFFFF[/code] at the specified location.

members.name: HasAutoBraceCompletionCloseKey
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if close key [param close_key] exists.

members.name: HasAutoBraceCompletionOpenKey
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if open key [param open_key] exists.

members.name: HasCommentDelimiter
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if comment [param start_key] exists.

members.name: HasStringDelimiter
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if string [param start_key] exists.

members.name: IndentLines
members.summary: Indents all lines that are selected or have a caret on them. Uses spaces or a tab depending on [member indent_use_spaces]. See [method unindent_lines].

members.name: IsInComment
members.signature: public int IsInComment(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns delimiter index if [param line] [param column] is in a comment. If [param column] is not provided, will return delimiter index if the entire [param line] is a comment. Otherwise [code]-1[/code].

members.name: IsInString
members.signature: public int IsInString(int line, int column)
members.summary: Returns the delimiter index if [param line] [param column] is in a string. If [param column] is not provided, will return the delimiter index if the entire [param line] is a string. Otherwise [code]-1[/code].

members.name: IsLineBookmarked
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is bookmarked. See [method set_line_as_bookmarked].

members.name: IsLineBreakpointed
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is breakpointed. See [method set_line_as_breakpoint].

members.name: IsLineCodeRegionEnd
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is a code region end. See [method set_code_region_tags].

members.name: IsLineCodeRegionStart
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is a code region start. See [method set_code_region_tags].

members.name: IsLineExecuting
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is marked as executing. See [method set_line_as_executing].

members.name: IsLineFolded
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given line is folded. See [method fold_line].

members.name: JoinLines
members.summary: Joins all selected lines or lines containing a caret with their next line. Whitespace in between will be removed. If the next line has content, the [param line_ending] will be inserted in between.

members.name: MoveLinesDown
members.summary: Moves all lines down that are selected or have a caret on them.

members.name: MoveLinesUp
members.summary: Moves all lines up that are selected or have a caret on them.

members.name: RemoveCommentDelimiter
members.summary: Removes the comment delimiter with [param start_key].

members.name: RemoveStringDelimiter
members.summary: Removes the string delimiter with [param start_key].

members.name: RequestCodeCompletion
members.summary: Emits [signal code_completion_requested], if [param force] is [code]true[/code] will bypass all checks. Otherwise will check that the caret is in a word or in front of a prefix. Will ignore the request if all current options are of type file path, node path, or signal.

members.name: SetCodeCompletionSelectedIndex
members.summary: Sets the current selected completion option.

members.name: SetCodeHint
members.summary: Sets the code hint text. Pass an empty string to clear.

members.name: SetCodeHintDrawBelow
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the code hint will draw below the main caret. If [code]false[/code], the code hint will draw above the main caret. See [method set_code_hint].

members.name: SetCodeRegionTags
members.signature: public void SetCodeRegionTags(String start, String end)
members.summary: Sets the code region start and end tags (without comment delimiter).

members.name: SetLineAsBookmarked
members.signature: public void SetLineAsBookmarked(int line, bool bookmarked)
members.summary: Sets the given line as bookmarked. If [code]true[/code] and [member gutters_draw_bookmarks] is [code]true[/code], draws the [theme_item bookmark] icon in the gutter for this line. See [method get_bookmarked_lines] and [method is_line_bookmarked].

members.name: SetLineAsBreakpoint
members.signature: public void SetLineAsBreakpoint(int line, bool breakpointed)
members.summary: Sets the given line as a breakpoint. If [code]true[/code] and [member gutters_draw_breakpoints_gutter] is [code]true[/code], draws the [theme_item breakpoint] icon in the gutter for this line. See [method get_breakpointed_lines] and [method is_line_breakpointed].

members.name: SetLineAsExecuting
members.signature: public void SetLineAsExecuting(int line, bool executing)
members.summary: Sets the given line as executing. If [code]true[/code] and [member gutters_draw_executing_lines] is [code]true[/code], draws the [theme_item executing_line] icon in the gutter for this line. See [method get_executing_lines] and [method is_line_executing].

members.name: SetSymbolLookupWordAsValid
members.summary: Sets the symbol emitted by [signal symbol_validate] as a valid lookup.

members.name: ToggleFoldableLine
members.summary: Toggle the folding of the code block at the given line.

members.name: ToggleFoldableLinesAtCarets
members.summary: Toggle the folding of the code block on all lines with a caret on them.

members.name: UnfoldAllLines
members.summary: Unfolds all lines that are folded.

members.name: UnfoldLine
members.summary: Unfolds the given line if it is folded or if it is hidden under a folded line.

members.name: UnindentLines
members.summary: Unindents all lines that are selected or have a caret on them. Uses spaces or a tab depending on [member indent_use_spaces]. Equivalent to the [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_dedent] action. See [method indent_lines].

members.name: UpdateCodeCompletionOptions
members.summary: Submits all completion options added with [method add_code_completion_option]. Will try to force the autocomplete menu to popup, if [param force] is [code]true[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] This will replace all current candidates.

members.name: AutoBraceCompletionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], uses [member auto_brace_completion_pairs] to automatically insert the closing brace when the opening brace is inserted by typing or autocompletion. Also automatically removes the closing brace when using backspace on the opening brace.

members.name: AutoBraceCompletionHighlightMatching
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], highlights brace pairs when the caret is on either one, using [member auto_brace_completion_pairs]. If matching, the pairs will be underlined. If a brace is unmatched, it is colored with [theme_item brace_mismatch_color].

members.name: AutoBraceCompletionPairs
members.summary: Sets the brace pairs to be autocompleted. For each entry in the dictionary, the key is the opening brace and the value is the closing brace that matches it. A brace is a [String] made of symbols. See [member auto_brace_completion_enabled] and [member auto_brace_completion_highlight_matching].

members.name: CodeCompletionEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_completion_query] action requests code completion. To handle it, see [method _request_code_completion] or [signal code_completion_requested].

members.name: CodeCompletionPrefixes
members.summary: Sets prefixes that will trigger code completion.

members.name: DelimiterComments
members.summary: Sets the comment delimiters. All existing comment delimiters will be removed.

members.name: DelimiterStrings
members.summary: Sets the string delimiters. All existing string delimiters will be removed.

members.name: GuttersDrawBookmarks
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], bookmarks are drawn in the gutter. This gutter is shared with breakpoints and executing lines. See [method set_line_as_bookmarked].

members.name: GuttersDrawBreakpointsGutter
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], breakpoints are drawn in the gutter. This gutter is shared with bookmarks and executing lines. Clicking the gutter will toggle the breakpoint for the line, see [method set_line_as_breakpoint].

members.name: GuttersDrawExecutingLines
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], executing lines are marked in the gutter. This gutter is shared with breakpoints and bookmarks. See [method set_line_as_executing].

members.name: GuttersDrawFoldGutter
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the fold gutter is drawn. In this gutter, the [theme_item can_fold_code_region] icon is drawn for each foldable line (see [method can_fold_line]) and the [theme_item folded_code_region] icon is drawn for each folded line (see [method is_line_folded]). These icons can be clicked to toggle the fold state, see [method toggle_foldable_line]. [member line_folding] must be [code]true[/code] to show icons.

members.name: GuttersDrawLineNumbers
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the line number gutter is drawn. Line numbers start at [code]1[/code] and are incremented for each line of text. Clicking and dragging in the line number gutter will select entire lines of text.

members.name: GuttersLineNumbersMinDigits
members.summary: The minimum width in digits reserved for the line number gutter.

members.name: GuttersZeroPadLineNumbers
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], line numbers drawn in the gutter are zero padded based on the total line count. Requires [member gutters_draw_line_numbers] to be set to [code]true[/code].

members.name: IndentAutomatic
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], an extra indent is automatically inserted when a new line is added and a prefix in [member indent_automatic_prefixes] is found. If a brace pair opening key is found, the matching closing brace will be moved to another new line (see [member auto_brace_completion_pairs]).

members.name: IndentAutomaticPrefixes
members.summary: Prefixes to trigger an automatic indent. Used when [member indent_automatic] is set to [code]true[/code].

members.name: IndentSize
members.summary: Size of the tabulation indent (one [kbd]Tab[/kbd] press) in characters. If [member indent_use_spaces] is enabled the number of spaces to use.

members.name: IndentUseSpaces
members.summary: Use spaces instead of tabs for indentation.

members.name: LineFolding
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], lines can be folded. Otherwise, line folding methods like [method fold_line] will not work and [method can_fold_line] will always return [code]false[/code]. See [member gutters_draw_fold_gutter].

members.name: LineLengthGuidelines
members.summary: Draws vertical lines at the provided columns. The first entry is considered a main hard guideline and is drawn more prominently.

members.name: SymbolLookupOnClick
members.summary: Set when a validated word from [signal symbol_validate] is clicked, the [signal symbol_lookup] should be emitted.

members.name: SymbolTooltipOnHover
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [signal symbol_hovered] signal is emitted when hovering over a word.

signals.name: BreakpointToggled
signals.summary: Emitted when a breakpoint is added or removed from a line. If the line is removed via backspace, a signal is emitted at the old line.

signals.name: CodeCompletionRequested
signals.summary: Emitted when the user requests code completion. This signal will not be sent if [method _request_code_completion] is overridden or [member code_completion_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

signals.name: SymbolHovered
signals.summary: Emitted when the user hovers over a symbol. Unlike [signal Control.mouse_entered], this signal is not emitted immediately, but when the cursor is over the symbol for [member ProjectSettings.gui/timers/tooltip_delay_sec] seconds. [b]Note:[/b] [member symbol_tooltip_on_hover] must be [code]true[/code] for this signal to be emitted.

signals.name: SymbolLookup
signals.summary: Emitted when the user has clicked on a valid symbol.

signals.name: SymbolValidate
signals.summary: Emitted when the user hovers over a symbol. The symbol should be validated and responded to, by calling [method set_symbol_lookup_word_as_valid]. [b]Note:[/b] [member symbol_lookup_on_click] must be [code]true[/code] for this signal to be emitted.

values.name: KIND_CLASS
values.summary: Marks the option as a class.

values.name: KIND_CONSTANT
values.summary: Marks the option as a constant.

values.name: KIND_ENUM
values.summary: Marks the option as an enum entry.

values.name: KIND_FILE_PATH
values.summary: Marks the option as a file path.

values.name: KIND_FUNCTION
values.summary: Marks the option as a function.

values.name: KIND_KEYWORD
values.summary: Marks the option as a keyword.

values.name: KIND_MEMBER
values.summary: Marks the option as a member.

values.name: KIND_NODE_PATH
values.summary: Marks the option as a Godot node path.

values.name: KIND_PLAIN_TEXT
values.summary: Marks the option as unclassified or plain text.

values.name: KIND_SIGNAL
values.summary: Marks the option as a Godot signal.

values.name: KIND_VARIABLE
values.summary: Marks the option as a variable.

values.name: LOCATION_LOCAL
values.summary: The option is local to the location of the code completion query - e.g. a local variable. Subsequent value of location represent options from the outer class, the exact value represent how far they are (in terms of inner classes).

values.name: LOCATION_OTHER
values.summary: The option is from other engine code, not covered by the other enum constants - e.g. built-in classes.

values.name: LOCATION_OTHER_USER_CODE
values.summary: The option is from user code which is not local and not in a derived class (e.g. Autoload Singletons).

values.name: LOCATION_PARENT_MASK
values.summary: The option is from the containing class or a parent class, relative to the location of the code completion query. Perform a bitwise OR with the class depth (e.g. [code]0[/code] for the local class, [code]1[/code] for the parent, [code]2[/code] for the grandparent, etc.) to store the depth of an option in the class or a parent class.

constants.name: KIND_CLASS
constants.summary: Marks the option as a class.

constants.name: KIND_FUNCTION
constants.summary: Marks the option as a function.

constants.name: KIND_SIGNAL
constants.summary: Marks the option as a Godot signal.

constants.name: KIND_VARIABLE
constants.summary: Marks the option as a variable.

constants.name: KIND_MEMBER
constants.summary: Marks the option as a member.

constants.name: KIND_ENUM
constants.summary: Marks the option as an enum entry.

constants.name: KIND_CONSTANT
constants.summary: Marks the option as a constant.

constants.name: KIND_NODE_PATH
constants.summary: Marks the option as a Godot node path.

constants.name: KIND_FILE_PATH
constants.summary: Marks the option as a file path.

constants.name: KIND_PLAIN_TEXT
constants.summary: Marks the option as unclassified or plain text.

constants.name: KIND_KEYWORD
constants.summary: Marks the option as a keyword.

constants.name: LOCATION_LOCAL
constants.summary: The option is local to the location of the code completion query - e.g. a local variable. Subsequent value of location represent options from the outer class, the exact value represent how far they are (in terms of inner classes).

constants.name: LOCATION_PARENT_MASK
constants.summary: The option is from the containing class or a parent class, relative to the location of the code completion query. Perform a bitwise OR with the class depth (e.g. [code]0[/code] for the local class, [code]1[/code] for the parent, [code]2[/code] for the grandparent, etc.) to store the depth of an option in the class or a parent class.

constants.name: LOCATION_OTHER_USER_CODE
constants.summary: The option is from user code which is not local and not in a derived class (e.g. Autoload Singletons).

constants.name: LOCATION_OTHER
constants.summary: The option is from other engine code, not covered by the other enum constants - e.g. built-in classes.

virtualMethods.name: _ConfirmCodeCompletion
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define how the selected entry should be inserted. If [param replace] is [code]true[/code], any existing text should be replaced.

virtualMethods.name: _FilterCodeCompletionCandidates
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what items in [param candidates] should be displayed. Both [param candidates] and the return is an [Array] of [Dictionary], see [method get_code_completion_option] for [Dictionary] content.

virtualMethods.name: _RequestCodeCompletion
virtualMethods.summary: Override this method to define what happens when the user requests code completion. If [param force] is [code]true[/code], any checks should be bypassed.
